/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_rlc.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_rlc.dir/rlc_am_pdu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_rlc.dir/rlc_bearer_metrics_collector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_rlc.dir/rlc_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_rlc.dir/rlc_tx_am_entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_rlc.dir/rlc_tx_tm_entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_rlc.dir/rlc_tx_um_entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_rlc.dir/rlc_rx_am_entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_rlc.dir/rlc_rx_tm_entity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_rlc.dir/rlc_rx_um_entity.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_rlc.a
